failures.explanation: Prediction mismatch. Methods: Alg=OK, ODE=decreased(r=0.000), RWR=OK. | Methods: Alg=OK, ODE=decreased(r=0.000), RWR=OK.
Prediction mismatch. Methods: Alg=OK, ODE=decreased(r=0.000), RWR=OK. | Methods: Alg=OK, ODE=decreased(r=0.000), RWR=OK.
RWR-specific Perception Gate leak (Trap 5): signed-diffusion leaks exogenous ZmCLE7 downstream of fea2 KO. Algebraic/ODE handle correctly. | Methods: Alg=OK, ODE=OK, RWR=decreased(r=0.997).
RWR-specific Perception Gate leak (Trap 5). Algebraic/ODE OK. | Methods: Alg=OK, ODE=OK, RWR=decreased(r=0.997).

Zmcrn + ZmFCP1 rescue — framework Trap 5 at ratio 0.944 (threshold borderline). ZmFCP1 still signals through the parallel FEA2/FEA3 arm in the model even when ZMCRN is KO, because the receptor complex is not modelled as all-or-none. | Methods: Alg=decreased(r=0.944), ODE=OK, RWR=decreased(r=0.999).

fea3 + ZmFCP1 rescue — same Trap 5 class. ZmFCP1 -> FEA2(+) provides residual signalling that dilutes the expected 'unchanged' signal below threshold (ratio 0.841). | Methods: Alg=decreased(r=0.841), ODE=decreased(r=0.942), RWR=decreased(r=0.999).

abph1 KO — ODE/RWR-specific failure; Algebraic correct. Nonlinear Hill/signed-diffusion reverses the CK negative-feedback loop sign relative to the canonical algebraic model. | Methods: Alg=OK, ODE=decreased(r=0.001), RWR=decreased(r=1.000).

Abphyl2 dominant (ABPH2 GOF -> FEA4 partial reduction to 0.5): iter 3 attempt to remove FEA4 -> BA1 did not improve accuracy and was reverted. Residual cascade through FEA4 -> RA3 -> T6P -> Ear_Branching amplification still drives the net direction down despite the new FEA4 -> KRN (-1) direct edge. | Methods: Alg=decreased(r=0.853), ODE=decreased(r=0.000), RWR=OK.

Bif3 (dominant ZmWUS1-locus duplication) produces extreme fasciation -> BARREN ear. Monotonic cascades cannot represent 'too much WUS -> no kernels' non-monotonicity. | Methods: Alg=increased(r=1.059), ODE=increased(r=1.058), RWR=increased(r=1.002).
Prediction mismatch. Methods: Alg=OK, ODE=OK, RWR=increased(r=1.003). | Methods: Alg=OK, ODE=OK, RWR=increased(r=1.003).
Prediction mismatch. Methods: Alg=OK, ODE=OK, RWR=increased(r=1.003). | Methods: Alg=OK, ODE=OK, RWR=increased(r=1.003).
Prediction mismatch. Methods: Alg=OK, ODE=OK, RWR=increased(r=1.003). | Methods: Alg=OK, ODE=OK, RWR=increased(r=1.003).

KRN4 cis-regulatory (UB3 gm=0.5) — partial KD at 0.5 dose is washed out by geometric-mean cascade (ratio 1.0003). Dilution limit for weak-KD tests in long cascades; structural shortcut (UB3->KRN -1) would invert the biologically-correct ub3 single KO (T043), so accept as framework limit. | Methods: Alg=unchanged(r=1.000), ODE=decreased(r=0.020), RWR=decreased(r=0.997).

ub2;ub3 double KO: UB3's dual regulatory role (activator of KN1/BIF2/ZMTCP30 AND repressor of IM_Size/Cytokinin) produces a non-monotonic dosage response. Single-KO biology (T043 correctly decreased) and double-KO biology (T045 increased) have opposite net directions; monotonic model cannot represent both. | Methods: Alg=decreased(r=0.182), ODE=decreased(r=0.000), RWR=decreased(r=0.983).
ub2;ub3;tsh4 triple KO: ODE-only failure, same non-monotonic dosage class as T045. | Methods: Alg=OK, ODE=decreased(r=0.000), RWR=OK.

WT + kinetin: Cytokinin exogenous supply is diluted across 4-step cascade (CK -> TYPE_B_ARR -> ZMWUS1 -> IM_Size -> KRN) with ABPH1 negative feedback compensating at ZMWUS1. Ratio 1.014 (below 1.05 threshold). | Methods: Alg=unchanged(r=1.014), ODE=unchanged(r=0.999), RWR=OK.
WT + BA: same geometric-mean dilution pattern as T062. | Methods: Alg=unchanged(r=1.014), ODE=unchanged(r=0.999), RWR=OK.
KNR6 OE: ODE-only failure — Hill K=0.5 saturates the OE signal. Algebraic and RWR both correct. ODE-parameter sensitivity, not a structural issue. | Methods: Alg=OK, ODE=unchanged(r=1.021), RWR=OK.

fea4 + ZmCLE7 peptide rescue: FEA2/CT2/ZMCRN arm still active in the fea4 background, so ZmCLE7 still suppresses IM. The reported 'CLE peptide further enhances fasciation on fea4' outcome depends on two-arm interaction not captured by the current cascade topology. | Methods: Alg=unchanged(r=1.000), ODE=unchanged(r=0.960), RWR=decreased(r=0.997).
Prediction mismatch. Methods: Alg=OK, ODE=decreased(r=0.000), RWR=unchanged(r=1.000). | Methods: Alg=OK, ODE=decreased(r=0.000), RWR=unchanged(r=1.000).

UB3 OE: same non-monotonic dosage response as T045. UB3 OE at gm=2.0 activates downstream KN1/BIF2/ZMTCP30 (KRN-promoting) while also inhibiting IM_Size/Cytokinin (KRN-restricting); directions partially cancel to ratio ~1. | Methods: Alg=unchanged(r=1.000), ODE=OK, RWR=increased(r=1.007).

post_refinement_notes: Refinement applied 5 kept fixes (1 edge_addition, 2 edge_removals, 1 edge_addition REL2->IM_Size, 2 encoding fixes) across iterations 1-2.
Iteration 3 attempted FEA4 -> BA1 removal; reverted (no accuracy gain).
Remaining failures are dominated by framework limitations (Perception Gate leaks, non-monotonic dosage response for UB3/Bif3, signal dilution, method-specific sign flips in RWR/ODE).
